reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: CONFIRMED: Gate 1 (Dead Code): PASS - function is called from onDataColumnSidecarsByRange handler registered in index.ts. Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): PASS - P2P entry point via untrusted peers. Gate 3 (Code Verification): PASS - Phase 03's code reading is accurate. The validation function at L124-144 explicitly checks startSlot < GENESIS_SLOT at L135, but the TODO comment at L134 confirms the missing epoch range check (max(current_epoch - MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS, FULU_FORK_EPOCH)). dataColumnSidecarsByRoot.ts:L18-23 correctly implements this check, proving this is a spec deviation. Gate 4 (Exploitability): PASS - An attacker can trigger this via P2P by sending DataColumnSidecarsByRangeRequest with startSlot from epochs before max(current_epoch - 4096, FULU_FORK_EPOCH), causing the node to waste resources attempting to serve data columns from epochs it's not required to retain. Gate 5 (Spec Cross-Reference): PASS - 01e entry PROP-6a4369e9-inv-027 from 01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json (L752-767) requires 'data_column_serve_range lower bound must be max(current_epoch - MIN_EPOCHS, FULU_FORK_EPOCH)' with assertion 'serve_range.start == max(current_epoch - MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS, FULU_FORK_EPOCH)'. Gate 6 (Scope Check): PASS - Fusaka-specific PeerDAS validation issue, in-scope. Severity: Medium severity is appropriate per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json thresholds (resource exhaustion affecting single node, not network-wide impact).
reviewed_items.spec_reference: data_column_serve_range lower bound must be max(current_epoch - MIN_EPOCHS, FULU_FORK_EPOCH). Assertion: serve_range.start == max(current_epoch - MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS_REQUESTS, FULU_FORK_EPOCH)
